creator: ksmakoto@dd.iij4u.or.jp
text:
gtkwave3 ports build failed by following errors.

cc -I./.. -I./helpers -D_THREAD_SAFE -I/usr/local/include/gtk-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/gtk-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/atk-1.0 -I/usr/local/include/cairo -I/usr/local/include/pango-1.0 -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/pixman-1 -I/usr/local/include/freetype2   -I./liblzma   -I./helpers/fst     -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing   -o gtkwave  globals.o ae2.o analyzer.o baseconvert.o bitvec.o bsearch.o busy.o clipping.o color.o currenttime.o debug.o discardbuttons.o edgebuttons.o entry.o extload.o fetchbuttons.o fgetdynamic.o file.o fonts.o fst.o getopt.o getopt1.o ghw.o ghwlib.o hierpack.o jrb.o help.o lxt2_read.o lxt_write.o vzt_read.o hiersearch.o interp.o logfile.o lx2.o lxt.o main.o markerbox.o menu.o mouseover.o mouseover_sigs.o pagebuttons.o pipeio.o pixmaps.o print.o ptranslate.o rc.o regex.o renderopt.o rgb.o search.o shiftbuttons.o showchange.o signalwindow.o simplereq.o splash.o status.o strace.o sy
 mbol.o tcl_commands.o tcl_helper.o timeentry.o translate.o tree.o treesearch.o vcd.o vcd_keywords.o vcd_partial.o vcd_recoder.o vcd_saver.o vlist.o vzt.o wavewindow.o zoombuttons.o -pthread -L/usr/local/lib -lgtk-x11-2.0 -lgdk-x11-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lgio-2.0 -lXext -lXrender -lXinerama -lXi -lXrandr -lXcursor -lXcomposite -lXdamage -lpangoft2-1.0 -lXfixes -lcairo -lX11 -lpango-1.0 -lm -lfreetype -lfontconfig -lgobject-2.0 -lgmodule-2.0 -lglib-2.0   -L./liblzma -llzma -lz -lbz2 -L./helpers/fst -lfst   -lpthread -lm
vzt_read.o(.text+0xee8): In function `vzt_rd_decompress_blk':
: undefined reference to `LZMA_fdopen'
vzt_read.o(.text+0xefa): In function `vzt_rd_decompress_blk':
: undefined reference to `LZMA_read'
vzt_read.o(.text+0xf05): In function `vzt_rd_decompress_blk':
: undefined reference to `LZMA_close'
vzt_read.o(.text+0x2483): In function `vzt_rd_init_smp':
: undefined reference to `LZMA_fdopen'
vzt_read.o(.text+0x24a7): In function `vzt_rd_init_smp':
: undefined reference to `LZMA_read'
vzt_read.o(.text+0x24b5): In function `vzt_rd_init_smp':
: undefined reference to `LZMA_close'
vzt_read.o(.text+0x2bd0): In function `vzt_rd_init_smp':
: undefined reference to `LZMA_fdopen'
vzt_read.o(.text+0x2bff): In function `vzt_rd_init_smp':
: undefined reference to `LZMA_read'
vzt_read.o(.text+0x2c0d): In function `vzt_rd_init_smp':
: undefined reference to `LZMA_close'

How-To-Repeat: $ cd /usr/ports/cad/gtkwave3
$ make
